name: Filled Hamburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, egg, salt, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl.
2. Form the mixture into 12 thin patties, each about 3 1/2-inches in diameter.
3. Top half of the patties with one filling (such as dill pickle or pickle relish, prepared mustard, catsup, horseradish, onion slices or finely chopped onion, tomato slices, process American cheese, or cheddar cheese slices).
4. Cover each filled patty with a remaining piece.
5. Broil or grill patties 4-inches from the heat, turning once, to desired doneness (about 10 minutes).
Peppy Cheese Filling:
1/4 cup Cheese
2 tbsp Mayonnaise or Salad Dressing
1 lb Worcestershire Sauce
1/2 tsp Salt
1/2 tsp Prepared Mustard
1/4 tsp Pepper
